mapper.select: { CALL sonictmsdev_mssql..USP_ALRM_AGNTLIST_SAVE ( #{saveGubn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{alrmAgntlistId,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cmpyCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{agntCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userNm ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{alrmTlkHp ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{alrmTlkYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{saveUser ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) }
